module.name: TAG Protect
module.description: Block inbound and outbound calls against TAG Protect lists, with a local cache, always-allow list, Class of Service per-group list overrides, configurable blocked-call recording, and a number tester.
module.changelog: *1.1.0* Class of Service (COS) per-group list overrides; configurable blocked-call recording (select any system recording); number normalization (strip leading 1 from 11-digit numbers); extension-aware number tester; AGI preamble drain fix for FastAGI double-newline; cosmap refreshed on every dialplan reload. *1.0.0* Initial GUI module: settings, always-allow editor, per-route inbound screening, number tester.
